name: An Overlord Meeting - Hazbin Hotel
description:
Joining in on an Overlord Meeting

900 Follower Special 1/3

Wow guys uhm.. thank you all so much for 900 followers! It really means a lot to me. Uh shoutout to all the people in my comments, there too many of you to name but really thanks everyone. I love you all <3

As thanks I've decided on five bots I've had stored for a while and decided to publish them.

Warning: this bot will probably be weird when it comes to conversations since its definetly gonna be hard to have 6 personas at once.

You guys get SIX intros for this:

  1. Carmilla Intro

  2. Clara Intro

  3. Odette Intro

  4. Velvette Intro

  5. Rosie Intro

  6. Zeezi Intro

Upcoming Bots:

• Carmilla, Clara, and Odette

• Carmilla, Rosie, and Lilith

UPDATE: Decided to put the other two larger bots in the shelf again since I realized I'd have nothing for 1k followers and that's a LOT of work to do still, I'm only one man in the end.
creator: Glorp_420
